dailyNotification1: Don't miss out on making a change!
dailyNotification5:
Don't keep me waiting for too long…
I get lonely easily.
dailyNotification6: Let's get to it! I'm pumped!
dailyNotification7: I hope you haven't forgotten your tasks - cuz I didn't~
dailyNotification8: I'll keep your taskies warm and comfy for you.
dailyNotification9: Don't worry about adding new tasks, I can keep them all!
dailyNotification10: I love to keep track of your tasks!
dailyNotification12: Oh, is it morning already? Welcome back, let's do something fun today!
dailyNotification13:
Did you miss me?~
…cuz I missed you…
dailyNotification14: Oh! It's a pleasure to see you again!
dailyNotification15: I'm so happy to see you!
dailyNotification17: Your smile when you check off tasks is so pleasant.
dailyNotification18: Keep your head up! Your tasks might be back, but so are we!
dailyNotification19: Oh, sorry for being late. I was drinking some matcha.
dailyNotification20: Tea helps me to concentrate! Wanna have a small little tea party together?
dailyNotification21: There's no need to rush, let's see what we should do today.
dailyNotification22: Let's make it a better day together!
dailyNotification23: New day, new possibilities - same Yrellis~
dailyNotification24: Did you know that I can speak German? Ich hab dich lieb~
dailyNotification25: I want you to make your dreams come true~
dailyNotification26: I have a feeling today will be a great day!
dailyNotification27: If you get overwhelmed by your tasks today, don't worry about skipping one or two. (I won't tell anyone)
dailyNotification28:

dailyNotification29: How can I make your day just a little bit brighter?

dailyNotification31: How can I make you slime today? …smile. I mean smile.
